must_detect.matched_text: Subject: PDPA, MNPI, and SGX considerations for the proposed acquisition by MarineX Holdings Ltd. (SGX: MXH).

098765; contact: charmaine.ong@marinex-holdings.sg, +65 8123 4567.
Counterparty: Pelagic Robotics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 2018 998765 K); lead contact Mr. Adrian Teo K.L. (Passport No. K1234567).
Escrow details for deposit: Harborline Bank (SG), Client A/C: 719-228-004-1; do not transmit bank data via unsecured channels.
For diligence, target provided employee lists; under PDPA, treat names, personal emails, and mobile numbers as personal data; role-only titles (e.g., Head of HR) are not personal data.
The following are not to be onboarded: NRIC: S0000000Z (invalid placeholder), Phone: 1800-000-0000 (general hotline), Name: ______, Address: ______.
Unpublished valuation range (S$4.20–S$4.60 per share), proposed timetable for mandatory general offer, and staff redundancy plans constitute MNPI under SFA ss. 218/219.
Maintain insider lists, pre-clearance, and trading halt protocols per SGX-ST Listing Manual Rule 703; no cleansing until binding terms are signed and announced.
Any pre-sounding for a concurrent placement must be wall-crossed; emails to investors from capitalmarkets@marinex-holdings.sg must exclude price-sensitive details until wall-crossing confirmation.
PDPA notices to be issued to target employees prior to any transfer of HR files; confirm DPO appointment and data retention policy alignment; do not email medical data.
ACRA extracts, auditor engagement letters, and GST registration status (via UEN) are generally available; MAS approvals not required for ordinary share acquisition below threshold.
Employment: combine and record revised terms for senior management; do not use published switchboard +65 6123 0000 as a personal contact; obtain consent for any background screening.
Queries to Ms. Charmaine Ong, General Counsel, charmaine.ong@marinex-holdings.sg
